detail: previsio-facturacio query now filters rows with `floor(pl.pendent) < 1`; file uploaded via SFTP.
text:
I'll narrow the WHERE clause so rows with sub-1 `pendent` are filtered out.

Now upload via SFTP.

Uploaded to dev2.ateinsa.com.

Changed the WHERE clause in `app/Services/PrevisioFacturacio/LlistatService.php:198` from `pl.pendent <> 0` to `floor(pl.pendent) >= 1`, so rows with `pendent` below 1 (e.g. 0,01) are excluded from the listing.

result: previsio-facturacio query now filters rows with `floor(pl.pendent) < 1`; file uploaded via SFTP.

detail: i do need the negative values tho
filter now uses `floor(abs(pl.pendent)) >= 1`, preserving negative pendent values.
text:
I'll narrow the WHERE clause so rows with sub-1 `pendent` are filtered out.

Now upload via SFTP.

Uploaded to dev2.ateinsa.com.

Changed the WHERE clause in `app/Services/PrevisioFacturacio/LlistatService.php:198` from `pl.pendent <> 0` to `floor(pl.pendent) >= 1`, so rows with `pendent` below 1 (e.g. 0,01) are excluded from the listing.

result: previsio-facturacio query now filters rows with `floor(pl.pendent) < 1`; file uploaded via SFTP.

Changed to `floor(abs(pl.pendent)) >= 1` so negatives with magnitude ≥ 1 are kept; only values strictly between -1 and 1 are filtered out.

result: filter now uses `floor(abs(pl.pendent)) >= 1`, preserving negative pendent values.
